question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Grande Terre will be higher on 2026-04-19 than on 2026-04-12?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61998.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-04-12 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2026-04-02) was 5.312. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at Grande Terre.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - KERGUELEN - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.61998.D.
